body:
APPROVE
Federation surface is implemented cleanly: a FederationProvider interface decouples resolvers from the registry, fan-out reuses the B14.6a client, routing metadata is consistently attached to each row, and the synthetic `@identity:*` capability is filtered. Tests cover all four queries against two mock httptest spokes including partial-result and version-skew rendering. Local schema is untouched per parallel-ship requirement.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260502T180604-a2d59986/reviewer-stream.log

success
